name: Cleric C2: Bless + Bane + Multi-PC Party (Buff/Debuff)
description: Multi-PC party scenario: Life Cleric L5 + Fighter Champion L5 + Paladin Devotion L5 vs 3 Hobgoblins. Tests: (1) Cleric casts Bless on all allies — concentration set, +1d4 to attack rolls/saves for whole party, L1 slot consumed (GAP-2/BUG-4 appears fixed). (2) Multi-PC turn flow: Fighter and Paladin make attacks while Bless is active. (3) Guiding Bolt (L1 non-concentration) correctly consumes a slot while Bless concentration persists. (4) Bane cast attempt in R3 — expected error (Bane not yet in spell catalog; GAP-BANE documented).

characters.comment: Brother Aldric: Life Cleric L5. WIS 18 (+4), spellSaveDC 15, spellAttackBonus +7. Concentrates on Bless R1-R2. Attempts Bane in R3 (GAP: not in catalog → expected error).
characters.name: Brother Aldric

characters.comment: Sir Gareth: Fighter Champion L5. STR 18 (+4), DEX 12 (+1). Extra Attack: 2 attacks per Attack action (second attack auto-chained by test harness). actionSurge and secondWind available but not used in this scenario.
characters.name: Sir Gareth

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: Take an additional action on your turn (1/short rest)

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: Regain 1d10 + Fighter level HP as a bonus action (1/short rest)

characters.comment: Lord Harwick: Paladin Devotion L5. STR 18 (+4), CHA 16 (+3). Extra Attack: 2 attacks per Attack action (second auto-chained). layOnHands 25 HP pool and channelDivinity available but not tested in this scenario.
characters.name: Lord Harwick

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: Expend a spell slot after hitting to deal extra radiant damage (not tested here)

monsters.comment: Hobgoblin Vanguard: high HP (100), heavy AC (18). Primary target for Sir Gareth. Attacks with Longsword +3.
monsters.name: Hobgoblin Vanguard

monsters.comment: Hobgoblin Guard: high HP (100), heavy AC (18). Primary target for Lord Harwick. Same stats as Vanguard.
monsters.name: Hobgoblin Guard

monsters.comment: Hobgoblin Scout: lighter AC (16), HP 80. Ranged attacker. Target for Aldric's Guiding Bolt in R2.
monsters.name: Hobgoblin Scout

actions.comment: Queue 12 endTurn decisions for all 3 monsters across 4 rounds (3 monsters × 4 rounds). This prevents monsters from attacking PCs, keeping HP deterministic and avoiding reactions/OA complications. Remaining queue entries are consumed once and the queue goes empty (falling back to attack) after R4 monster turns.

=== ROUND 1: COMBAT START + BLESS === Aldric initiates. DEX 12 → +1 mod. Roll 20 → 20+1=21 initiative. Gareth and Harwick auto-roll. Hobgoblins auto-roll (DEX 12, max 21). Aldric guaranteed to go first at initiative 21.

input.text: I raise my holy symbol and prepare the party for battle

actions.comment: Aldric rolls 20 (20 + DEX +1 = 21 initiative). combatStarted: true confirms all combatants entered initiative order.

R1 Aldric action: cast Bless on all allies. Bless (L1, concentration) applies +1d4 to attack rolls AND saving throws for up to 3 creatures. 'cast Bless' with no explicit target applies to all allies in the party (Bless effects.appliesTo = 'allies'). Returns SIMPLE_ACTION_COMPLETE — no attack or damage roll needed. NOTE: GAP-2/BUG-4 (Bless not consuming a slot) appears to be FIXED — Bless now correctly consumes a L1 slot (4 → 3). We assert the slot after this cast.
PRIMARY C2 ASSERTION: Aldric is now concentrating on Bless. This confirms the concentration mechanic works for buff spells.
Assert L1 slot consumed by Bless: 4 → 3. NOTE: GAP-2/BUG-4 appears fixed — Bless now correctly consumes a slot. Combat active, all 3 enemies alive.
Aldric ends R1 turn after casting Bless.
Wait for Sir Gareth's R1 turn. Monsters may act between (queued to endTurn — no damage). waitForTurn skips any intervening turns.

R1 Sir Gareth action: attack Hobgoblin Vanguard with Longsword. Fighter L5 has Extra Attack — 2 attacks per action. First attack is submitted explicitly; second attack auto-completes (test harness sends natural-1 miss). Bless is active: server adds +1d4 to Gareth's attack roll.
Attack roll 15. Total: 15 + 7 (attack bonus) + Bless 1d4 (server-side 1-4) = 23–26 vs Vanguard AC 18 → guaranteed hit.

Damage roll 6. Longsword: 1d8+4 = 10 slashing. Vanguard HP: 100 - 10 = 90. Extra Attack chain auto-completes with natural-1 (1+7+Bless ≤ 12 vs AC 18 → miss, 0 damage). actionComplete: true after chain exhausted.
Assert Hobgoblin Vanguard took 10 damage from Gareth's first attack. Exact 90 HP (Extra Attack auto-miss deals 0).
Sir Gareth ends R1 turn.
Wait for Lord Harwick's R1 turn.
R1 Lord Harwick action: attack Hobgoblin Guard with Longsword. Paladin L5 has Extra Attack. Bless active: +1d4 to Harwick's attack roll (server-side).
Attack roll 12. Total: 12 + 7 + Bless 1d4 (1-4) = 20–23 vs Guard AC 18 → hit.
Damage roll 5. Longsword: 1d8+4 = 9 slashing. Guard HP: 100 - 9 = 91. Extra Attack auto-misses.
Assert Hobgoblin Guard took 9 damage. Exact 91 HP.
Lord Harwick ends R1 turn.
=== ROUND 2: BLESS MAINTAINED — GUIDING BOLT + PARTY ATTACKS === Verify Bless concentration persists through a non-concentration spell cast.

R2 Aldric action: cast Guiding Bolt at Hobgoblin Scout. Ranged spell attack (+7). 4d6 radiant damage. Guiding Bolt is NOT a concentration spell — Bless concentration should remain active after this cast. Consumes a L1 slot (slot tracking works for attack spells).

input.text: cast Guiding Bolt at Hobgoblin Scout

actions.comment: Guiding Bolt spell attack: roll 14. Total: 14 + 7 (spellAttackBonus) + Bless 1d4 (1-4) = 22–25 vs Scout AC 16 → hit.
Guiding Bolt damage: roll 20 (4d6 radiant). Scout HP: 80 - 20 = 60.
CONCENTRATION CHECK: Bless must still be 'Bless' after casting Guiding Bolt. Guiding Bolt is a non-concentration spell, so it does not drop or replace Bless.
Assert Guiding Bolt consumed L1 slot: 3 → 2 (Bless consumed 4→3 in R1, Guiding Bolt consumes 3→2 here).
Assert Hobgoblin Scout took 20 radiant damage from Guiding Bolt. HP: 80 - 20 = 60.
Aldric ends R2 turn.
Wait for Sir Gareth's R2 turn.
R2 Sir Gareth action: second round of attacks on Hobgoblin Vanguard. Bless still active (+1d4 to attack). Extra Attack auto-chain for second hit.
Attack roll 13. Total: 13 + 7 + Bless 1d4 = 21–24 vs AC 18 → hit.
Damage roll 5. Longsword: 1d8+4 = 9 slashing. Vanguard HP: 90 - 9 = 81. Extra Attack auto-misses (0 damage).
Sir Gareth ends R2 turn.
Wait for Lord Harwick's R2 turn.
R2 Lord Harwick action: second round of attacks on Hobgoblin Guard. Bless active.
Attack roll 11. Total: 11 + 7 = 18, equals AC 18 → HIT (meeting AC is a hit in D&D 5e). Bless adds +1d4 on top → even more reliable.
Damage roll 6. Longsword: 1d8+4 = 10 slashing. Guard HP: 91 - 10 = 81. Extra Attack auto-misses.
Lord Harwick ends R2 turn.

=== ROUND 3: BANE (GAP-11 FIXED) === Aldric casts Bane, replacing Bless concentration. Bane is now in the spell catalog (level-1.ts) with saveAbility: 'charisma' and appliesTo: 'enemies'. The hobgoblins roll CHA saves via the live dice roller (non-deterministic) — effects apply only to those that fail. Regardless of per-target save outcomes, concentration switches from Bless to Bane immediately on a successful cast.

R3: Cast Bane on Hobgoblin Vanguard. After GAP-11 fix, this is a successful cast (level 1 slot spent, concentration replaces Bless). Per-target CHA saves determine whether the effect actually applies, but concentration switch is unconditional.
Assert: concentration now on Bane (replaces Bless). Case matches engine storage (lowercase).
R3 Aldric ends his turn. The failed Bane did not consume his action in terms of game rules, but ending the turn here completes the scenario.
=== FINAL STATE ASSERTIONS === Verify accumulated HP damage across 2 rounds of PC attacks. All monsters alive (high HP, monsters only endTurned).
Hobgoblin Vanguard: R1 Gareth attack −10 (6+4), R2 Gareth attack −9 (5+4). 100 − 10 − 9 = 81.
Hobgoblin Guard: R1 Harwick attack −9 (5+4), R2 Harwick attack −10 (6+4). 100 − 9 − 10 = 81.
Hobgoblin Scout: R2 Guiding Bolt −20. 80 − 20 = 60.
